creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sunpoet     2011-09-19 18:30:35 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    shells/bash-completion Makefile pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Use @dirrmtry for PREFIX/etc/bash_completion.d
    Other ports (e.g. devel/glib20) install files to this directory.
  - Costmetic change: put build-related knobs together
  - Sort PLIST
  - Space/tab twiddle
  
  PR:             ports/160202
  Submitted by:   sunpoet (myself)
  Approved by:    maintainer (timeout, 24 days)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.26      +12 -13    ports/shells/bash-completion/Makefile
  1.7       +2 -2      ports/shells/bash-completion/pkg-plist
